Core Mission/Values.Stated: OneDigital provides insurance, employee benefits, HR consulting, and financial services to help businesses and individuals manage risk, control costs, and plan for long-term success. They emphasize improving lives through services like Medicare enrollment and personalized health solutions. (https://www.onedigital.com, https://www.onedigital.com/en-US/careers/advanced-health-careers/)
Core Mission/Values.Observed: Focus on career growth, support, and making a difference in people's lives, particularly in Medicare and health benefits distribution. (https://www.onedigital.com/en-US/careers/, https://www.onedigital.com/en-US/careers/advanced-health-careers/)

Module A.Problem Space: OneDigital solves pain points in navigating complex insurance, Medicare, employee benefits, HR, and financial services by providing transparent, personalized guidance, advocacy, and tech-based products to simplify enrollment, manage risk, and control costs. (https://www.onedigital.com, https://www.onedigital.com/en-US/careers/advanced-health-careers/, https://builtin.com/job/embedded-product-manager-remote/9184229)
Module A.Business Model: Revenue from insurance brokerage, Medicare distribution (Advantage, supplemental, prescription drug plans), employee benefits, HR consulting, and financial services. Growth stage: Expanding organization with active hiring; OneDigital Advanced Health founded in 2018 (previously HealthWorks). Financial health: Not detailed in recent sources, but indicates growth via job postings and career emphasis. (https://www.onedigital.com, https://www.onedigital.com/en-US/careers/advanced-health-careers/, https://onedigital.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/OneDigital)
Module A.Founding Story: OneDigital Advanced Health founded in 2018 as HealthWorks, evolving into a Medicare distributor focused on enrollment and member advocacy. Broader OneDigital operates in insurance and HR services with no specific founding date in sources. (https://www.onedigital.com/en-US/careers/advanced-health-careers/)

JD Analysis.Hidden Success Signals: Exceptional communication (critical), bias toward action/experimentation, comfort in ambiguity, hands-on building, driving adoption.
